ingredients_text: Chicken and Bean Filling (57%) [RSPCA Approved Australian Chicken Breast (18%), Diced Tomato (Tomato, Tomato Juice, Acidity Regulator (330)), 4 Bean Mix (Lima Beans, Red Kidney Beans, Chick Peas, Great Northern Beans, Water, Sugar, Salt, Acidity Regulator (260), Firming Agent (509)), Onion, Tomato Purée (Tomato Purée, Acidity Regulator (330)), Cream, Water, Maize Starch, Garlic Purée (Garlic Purée, Salt), Canola Oil, Chilli, Salt, Sugar, Cumin, Coriander, Paprika, Pepper, Oregano], Tortilla (24%) [Wheat Flour, Water, Vegetable Shortening (Palm Oil**, Emulsifier (471), Antioxidant (320), Humectant (422)), Conditioner (Vegetable Emulsifiers (471, 481), Soy Flour, Wheat Flour), Oat Fibre, Baking Powder (Raising Agents (501, 541), Wheat Starch), iodised Salt, Gluten (Wheat), Acidity Regulator (297), Thickener (412), Preservative (281, 200)], Cheddar Cheese (11%) [Milk, Salt, Starter Culture, Vegetarian Rennet, Anticaking Agent (460), Preservative (200)], Napoli Sauce (6%) [Tomato Purée (Tomato Purée, Acidity Regulator (330)), Water, Maize Starch, Salt, Sugar, Onion Flakes, Garlic Powder, Parsley, Oregano, Basil, Pepper].
